channel.title: Mater. Today Phys.
channel.description: Filtered papers from Mater. Today Phys.

item.title: Transparent Terahertz Planar Platform for Multiband Radiation Heating and Label-Free Biosensing
item.description:
Publication date: August 2026

Source: Materials Today Physics, Volume 66

Author(s): Ying Bao, Haolan Wang, Fei Jia, Baoning Wang, Kaibo Shen, Lijuan Xie, Yibin Ying, Wendao Xu

item.title: Corrigendum to “Machine-Learning Potentials for Quantum and Anharmonic Effects in Superconducting <math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" altimg="si1.svg" Class="math"><mrow><mi Mathvariant="bold-italic">F</mi><mi Mathvariant="bold-Italic">m</mi><mover Accent="true"><mn mathvariant="bold">3</mn><mo>‾</mo></mover><mi Mathvariant="bold-Italic">m</mi></mrow></math> LaBeH<sub>8</sub>” [Mater. item.description:
Publication date: May 2026

Source: Materials Today Physics, Volume 64
